item.title: Deploying a Multi-Agent System with Terraform and Cloud Run
item.snippet: A deployment guide for a multi-agent system using Terraform and Cloud Run with one MCP integration section and a short least-privilege note.
item.content:
This tutorial walks through a multi-agent system deployed on Cloud Run with Terraform and rollout validation.

## Overview
We start with a multi-agent system design and the deployment goals.

## Terraform Provisioning
Terraform creates Cloud Run services and supporting deployment resources.

## MCP Integration
The MCP server exposes tool access for a knowledge connector and request routing.

## Service Accounts and Least Privilege
Service accounts and least privilege are covered as supporting operational guidance.

## Validation and Rollout
Testing and rollout checks confirm the deployment works in production.
